name: The Gemini (Double Trouble)
description: When you recruit your first unit from the shop, instantly gain an additional copy of that character.
notes: "$event_payload.item_id" is the templating convention from FIELD_REFERENCE.md -- it's swapped for whatever unit was just bought, so this works for ANY first recruit, not one hardcoded unit. once_per_run guards it for the rest of the save file's life, not just one battle.
